messages:
Hi Omar,
Thanks for everything. I really liked the apartment and had a great stay.
Thank u sir

Hello Omar, 
I hope you’re doing well.
My colleague and I have already booked your place for our business trip to Cairo and it was perfect. 
we want to do another reservation for the next 2 weeks 

Can you please confirm that the appartment is available 
Regards,

Hello
My passport
Tissue and napkins please
Keep them with decurity

Pkease put it beside the door or inside
I checked no it is not available
I checked it no place on the wall
Please
Man open and put it beside the door
U have the code
Or put it outside beside the door
Thanks Omar !

Hello 
Can we have cleaning service tomorrow morning please? After 10am ?
Yes after 10am
Ok perfect thanks !
Yes please
Hello Omar you didn't do cleaning

Can you please do it tomorrow morning 
Thanks

Hello Omar I think there is an issue with payment of cleaning 
Airbnb are asking for payment and I am sure I did it last time 
Can you please check ?
I ordered only 1 but it wasn't done then you did it the next day
So only 1
hi Omar, do you have 3 bedrooms apartment for 01/02/2026 till 06/02/2026 ?

i asked the team to reserve this one https://www.airbnb.com/rooms/1455828160010498804?adults=3&check_in=2026-02-01&check_out=2026-02-06&search_mode=regular_search&source_impression_id=p3_1769687396_P3Q1h-1c0RqGRMGh&previous_page_section_name=1000&federated_search_id=59ce8ec8-a8ab-4285-ba17-8326ec5cb51c
